etymology.description: semantic: 衤(衣) (yī, "clothing") + phonetic: 因(因) (yīn, "cause") = a form of clothing, specifically a mat
etymology.interpretation: The character 裀 (yīn, "mat") combines 衤(衣) (yī, "clothing") for its semantic meaning, indicating something related to textiles, with 因(因) (yīn, "cause") as a phonetic component to suggest its pronunciation.
